listings.title: Add RSVP to Hack Club Events
listings.description: Change events.hackclub.com and @Isabelle (app and site are tied together) so that event pages include an RSVP feature which the event creator can access. Find Isabelle's repository at github.com/hackclub/isabelle
requirements: Add an RSVP on event pages.
Event creator can access the full RSVP list.
Other users can only see RSVP count.
